sentences.arabic: التَّمَارِينُ الرِّيَاضِيَّةُ الْمُنْتَظِمَةُ تُقَوِّي الْعَضَلَاتِ وَالْقَلْبَ.
sentences.translation: Redovno vježbanje jača mišiće i srce.
sentences.translationEn: Regular exercise strengthens the muscles and the heart.

sentences.arabic: أَذْهَبُ إِلَى الْحَدِيقَةِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ لِلْمَشْيِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً.
sentences.translation: Svako jutro idem u park kako bih šetao trideset minuta.
sentences.translationEn: I go to the park every morning to walk for thirty minutes.

sentences.arabic: الرِّيَاضَةُ تَجْعَلُنِي أَشْعُرُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ وَتُقَلِّلُ مِنَ التَّوَتُّرِ.
sentences.translation: Vježbanje čini da se osjećam sretno i smanjuje stres.
sentences.translationEn: Exercise makes me feel happy and reduces stress.
